nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 雉科
nodes.summary: 雉科（Phasianidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联179种鸟类，如Udzungwa forest partridge、銹紅林鷓鴣、冠鷓鴣等179种鸟类。

nodes.name: 小种群风险
nodes.summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

nodes.name: 雨林
nodes.summary: 雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联99种鸟类，包括叢塚雉、鳳冠孔雀雉、Amboyna cuckoo-dove等99种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 平均海拔
nodes.summary: 平均海拔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联25种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Andean guan、鳳冠孔雀雉等25种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鳳冠孔雀雉
nodes.summary: 鳳冠孔雀雉（Malayan peacock-pheasant，学名 Polyplectron malacense），分类上属于鸡形目，并归入雉科，在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要分布于雨林、平均海拔，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、小种群风险、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 鸡形目
nodes.summary: 鸡形目（Galliformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联298种鸟类，如眼斑冢雉、Red-billed brushturkey、Black-billed brushturkey等298种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The average population density in suitable habitat is estimated as slightly less than seven adult birds per square kilometer. It inhabits mainly dipterocarp rainforest up to 150 m ASL, rarely occurring even as low as 300 m ASL

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The average population density in suitable habitat is estimated as slightly less than seven adult birds per square kilometer. It inhabits mainly dipterocarp rainforest up to 150 m ASL, rarely occurring even as low as 300 m ASL

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Due to ongoing habitat loss, small population size and limited range, the Malayan peacock-pheasant is evaluated as endangered on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Due to ongoing habitat loss, small population size and limited range, the Malayan peacock-pheasant is evaluated as endangered on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is listed on CITES Appendix II. Deforestation is the main threat for this species, and has rendered more than half of the places where it was found in the 1970s unsuitable for it

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: 鳳冠孔雀雉 属于目 鸡形目。

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: 鳳冠孔雀雉 属于科 雉科。
